case_title: DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY VS. MARK A MUNOZ et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-07-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-28-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $218.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MUNOZ, MARK A AN INDIVIDUAL
